paragraphs: Hi! I'm Humendra Pun — a data professional with an MSc in Software Engineering from the University of West London, graduated with First-Class Honours.

I specialise in transforming complex datasets into clear, actionable intelligence using Python, SQL, Power BI, and Excel. My background spans machine learning, big data analytics, and software engineering — giving me both the technical depth and the strategic mindset to solve real business problems.
I'm passionate about using data to tell stories and build models that make a real impact. Whether it's a churn prediction model or an executive dashboard, I focus on insights that drive decisions.
